metadata.user_instruction: Find the most recent email from world.news@gmail.com containing the keyword 'Global Economy' from the past month.
metadata.extraction_instruction: Extract only the concrete parameters (recipient, amount, account ID, file path, etc.) explicitly stated in this instruction.
